JOHN DOE
Senior DevOps Engineer

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced DevOps Engineer with 3+ years of experience in CI/CD pipeline design,
containerization, and cloud infrastructure. Skilled in automating deployment workflows
using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI. Strong background in Kubernetes cluster
management, Terraform-based infrastructure as code, and monitoring with Grafana and
Prometheus.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
- Programming: Python, Bash, JavaScript, SQL, C++
- CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Maven, Gradle
- Containers: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Docker Compose
- Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, IAM, Lambda, RDS), GCP
- IaC: Terraform, Ansible
- Monitoring: Grafana, Prometheus, Alertmanager, ELK Stack
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
- OS: Linux (Ubuntu, CentOS), Nginx
- Version Control: Git, Branching Strategies
- Other: Microservices, REST APIs, Agile/Scrum, Jira

WORK EXPERIENCE

DevOps Engineer | TechCorp Solutions | Jan 2022 - Present
- Designed and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions,
  reducing deployment time by 60%
- Managed Kubernetes clusters (K8s) with Helm charts for 15+ microservices
- Implemented infrastructure as code using Terraform for AWS resources
  including EC2, S3, RDS, and VPC configurations
- Built monitoring dashboards in Grafana with Prometheus metrics and
  configured Alertmanager for SLO-based alerting
- Containerized applications using Docker with multi-stage builds,
  reducing image sizes by 70%
- Automated database backups using Python scripts with boto3 for S3

Junior DevOps Engineer | StartupXYZ | Jun 2020 - Dec 2021
- Set up GitLab CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment
- Managed Linux servers (Ubuntu) and configured Nginx reverse proxies
- Wrote Bash scripts for log rotation, backup automation, and monitoring
- Deployed applications on AWS EC2 with Ansible playbooks
